# Snappet
> Snappet is a hub of 20+ free, privacy-friendly browser tools — calculators, developer utilities, productivity apps, a video editor and more. No sign-up, no install, works offline.

## Tools
- [Tip Calculator](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/tip-calculator/): The Snappet Tip Calculator is a free browser tool that works out the tip and splits the bill evenly across any number of people — instantly, with no sign-up.
- [Expense Splitter](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/expense-splitter/): The Snappet Expense Splitter is a free browser tool for sharing group expenses fairly — track who paid what and see exactly who owes whom.
- [Kanban Board](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/kanban-board/): The Snappet Kanban Board is a free, browser-based task board that organizes work into drag-and-drop columns — no account required.
- [JSON Explorer & Formatter](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/json-explorer/): The Snappet JSON Explorer is a free online JSON formatter, validator, and viewer that pretty-prints, minifies, and lets you explore JSON as a collapsible tree.
- [Regex Playground](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/regex-playground/): The Snappet Regex Playground is a free online regex tester that matches, highlights, and explains regular expressions against your text in real time.
- [Code Snapshot](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/code-snapshot/): Snappet Code Snapshot is a free browser tool that turns source code into beautiful, shareable images with syntax highlighting and customizable themes.
- [Markdown Editor](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/markdown-editor/): The Snappet Markdown Editor is a free, browser-based Markdown editor with a live side-by-side preview and export — no sign-up required.
- [Document Viewer](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/doc-viewer/): The Snappet Document Viewer is a free, private, in-browser PDF and image viewer with OCR that extracts selectable text — your files never leave your device.
- [Age Calculator](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/age-calculator/): The Snappet Age Calculator is a free browser tool that computes your exact age in years, months, and days, plus the countdown to your next birthday.
- [Pomodoro Timer](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/pomodoro-timer/): The Snappet Pomodoro Timer is a free, browser-based focus timer that runs 25-minute work sessions with short and long breaks to boost productivity.
- [Color Picker & Converter](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/color-picker/): The Snappet Color Picker is a free online tool that converts colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL with a live preview and a WCAG contrast checker.
- [Password Generator](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/password-generator/): The Snappet Password Generator is a free browser tool that creates strong, random passwords with a live strength meter — generated locally, never stored or sent.
- [QR Code Generator](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/qr-code/): The Snappet QR Code Generator is a free browser tool that turns text, URLs, WiFi credentials, and contacts into scannable QR codes you can download.
- [Tally Counter](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/tally-counter/): The Snappet Tally Counter is a free, tap-anywhere counter for your phone or desktop — count people, reps, inventory, or laps with one big button.
- [Random Picker](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/random-picker/): The Snappet Random Picker is a free browser tool to flip a coin, roll dice, pick a random name from a list, or generate a random number.
- [Stopwatch](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/stopwatch/): The Snappet Stopwatch is a free, accurate online stopwatch with lap splits for workouts, cooking, study sessions, and intervals.
- [Unit Converter](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/unit-converter/): The Snappet Unit Converter is a free browser tool that converts length, weight, temperature, volume, speed, time, and data sizes instantly.
- [Workout](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/workout/): Snappet Workout is a free exercise library and workout tracker with 800+ exercises, photos, and step-by-step instructions — build routines and log sessions in your browser.
- [Video Editor](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/video-editor/): Snappet Video Editor is a free, 100% client-side video editor that trims, splits, sequences, adds text and filters, and exports MP4 — entirely in your browser, with no upload.
- [Board Explorer](https://harshal2802.github.io/Snappet/board-explorer/): Snappet Board Explorer is a free, in-browser tool to filter the Kilter / Tension (Aurora) climbing-board catalogue by board size, angle, grade, popularity and more, view any climb drawn on the board, then export the slice as CSV, JSON, or a SQLite database.
